creator: tijl@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Sat, 28 Dec 2013 23:57:56 +0100 Christoph Moench-Tegeder wrote:
> I think I tracked it down: I only get the error when portupgrade'ing
> from pvm-3.4.6_2 to pvm-3.4.6_3. Manually deinstalling pvm-3.4.6_2
> and then building/installing pvm-3.4.6_3 fixes the problem for me.
> Looks like "something" in their build system (aimk...) picks up
> some bad values. Perhaps it's easier to let users handle this
> than to fix aimk?

I still cannot reproduce it even with the previous version installed
while building the new version.  If you have the time could you try to
reproduce it and email me the build/install log?  If not I think I'll
just close the PR.
